mnemonics: SHARED: Shared Memory, Handles, APIs, Runtimes, Easy, Distributed
keyPoints: It provides a shared address space across distributed memory systems, making it appear as a single shared memory machine.
Programming models like OpenMP and pthreads can be used, simplifying the transition from shared memory programming.
The system handles data movement, coherence, and consistency automatically, abstracting the complexity from the programmer.
commonMistakes: Assuming memory access times are uniform (ignoring NUMA effects) which can lead to performance bottlenecks.
Over-synchronizing or using incorrect consistency models, causing deadlocks or unintended race conditions.
